content.rendered:
Any royalties from my works go to my parish’s St. Vincent de Paul Society for the aid of the poor and homeless. If something I wrote helps you, please consider donating to your local St. Vincent de Paul or another Catholic charity.
(all links are PDFs unless otherwise noted)

Writings by Matthew Manint

With Glory and Honor You Crowned Them – a book on the 7 female martyrs of the Roman Canon: Perpetua, Felicity, Agatha, Lucy, Agnes, Cecilia, and Anastasia. Full of beautiful artwork, history, and ancient texts. You may also order a Kindle Version or print versions (Color or Black/White).

To appreciate the artwork even more, download the high-resolution PDF.
.
Like a Dove in the Cleft of the Rock – a book that views the climb of holiness through the lens of the Song of Songs and the life of St. Mary Magdalene. Based on a retreat preached in 2013 to the Apostles of the Interior Life. You may also order a Kindle Version or a Print Version.
.
Lazarus Speaks – a book of interviews with homeless people on the Mississippi Gulf Coast. You may also order a Kindle Version or a Print Version.
.
  • On Work – a short commentary on selecting employment as a consecrated man living alone.
  • Fraternity of the Hidden Life – some ideas for a secular institute based on Bl. Charles’s spirituality.

Writings by Others

  • Bl. Charles de Foucauld: Heart of Christianity, Heart of Christ by Cardinal Jose Saraiva Martins – a beautiful essay on the spirituality of Bl. Charles
  • Charles de Foucauld by M.R. Hoste – a short life of Bl. Charles in pamphlet form by Catholic Truth Society (1936)
  • Review of Life by Joe Conrad – some excellent insights into the Review of Life by a member of a Cleveland lay community
  • Charles de Foucauld in 1904 by Fr. Tony Philpot – a series of notes and insights into Charles’s life
  • Charles de Foucauld by Rene Bazin – a classic, early biography of Fr. Charles
